items.title: A Distributed Matrix-Block-Vector Multiplication in Presence of System Performance Variability.
items.abstract: Distributed matrix-block-vector multiplication (Matvec) algorithm is a critical component of many applications, but can be computationally challenging for dense matrices of dimension O(10^6–10^7) and blocks of O(10–100) vectors. We present performance analysis, implementation, and optimization of our SMatVec library for Matvec under the effect of system variability. Our modeling shows that 1D pipelining Matvec is as efficient as 2D algorithms at small to medium clusters, which are sufficient for these problem sizes. We develop a performance tracing framework and a simulator that reveal pipeline bubbles caused by modest ~5% system variability. To tolerate such variability, our SMatVec library, which combines on-the-fly kernel matrix generation and Matvec, integrates four optimizations: inter-process data preloading, unconventional static thread scheduling, cache-aware tiling, and multi-version unrolling. In our benchmarks on O(10^5) Matvec problems, SMatVec achieves up to 1.85× speedup over COSMA and 17× over ScaLAPACK. For O(10^6) problems, where COSMA and ScaLAPACK exceed memory capacity, SMatVec maintains linear strong scaling and achieves peak performance of 75% FMA Flop/s. Its static scheduling policy has a 2.27× speedup compared to the conventional work-stealing dynamic scheduler, and is predicted to withstand up to 108% performance variability under exponential distributed variability simulation.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式矩阵块向量乘法 (Matvec) 算法是许多应用的关键组成部分，但对于维度 O(10^6–10^7) 的密集矩阵和 O(10–100) 向量块来说，计算上可能具有挑战性。我们介绍了在系统可变性的影响下，Matvec 的 SMatVec 库的性能分析、实现和优化。我们的建模表明，在中小型集群中，一维流水线 Matvec 与 2D 算法一样高效，这足以满足这些问题规模。我们开发了一个性能跟踪框架和一个模拟器，可以揭示由约 5% 的系统可变性引起的管道气泡。为了容忍这种变化，我们的 SMatVec 库结合了动态内核矩阵生成和 Matvec，集成了四种优化：进程间数据预加载、非常规静态线程调度、缓存感知平铺和多版本展开。在我们对 O(10^5) Matvec 问题的基准测试中，SMatVec 比 COSMA 实现了高达 1.85 倍的加速，比 ScaLAPACK 实现了 17 倍的加速。对于 O(10^6) 问题，当 COSMA 和 ScaLAPACK 超出内存容量时，SMatVec 保持线性强缩放并实现 75% FMA Flop/s 的峰值性能。与传统的工作窃取动态调度器相比，其静态调度策略具有 2.27 倍的加速，并且预计在指数分布变化模拟下可承受高达 108% 的性能变化。

items.title: PRISM: An Efficient GPU-Based Lossy Compression Framework for Progressive Data Retrieval with Multi-Level Interpolation.
items.abstract: With the exponential growth of computing power, large-scale scientific simulations are producing massive volumes of data, leading to critical storage and I/O challenges. Error-bounded lossy compression has become one of the most effective solutions for reducing data size while preserving accuracy. Meanwhile, to achieve high-performance compression on such large datasets, leveraging GPUs has become increasingly essential. GPU-based lossy compressors deliver strong performance, but typically support only single-precision decompression, limiting their ability to meet the diverse accuracy requirements of scientific workflows. Progressive compressors can address this limitation by enabling on-demand precision retrieval. However, existing progressive lossy compressors on GPU still suffer from low throughput. To overcome these challenges, we present PRISM, a GPU-based progressive lossy compressor that achieves both high throughput and multi-precision retrieval, which introduces a high performance progressive framework that integrates the multiple interpolation predictors, efficient bitplane extraction, and an enhanced lossless compression that combines sign-absolute coding with zero-aware parallel algorithms. Evaluations on representative real-world datasets from five scientific domains show that PRISM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art progressive compressors on GPU, reducing retrieval data volume by over 15.6× and achieving up to 20.1× higher throughput on the NVIDIA H100 GPU under the same error bounds.
items.abstract_zh: 随着计算能力的指数级增长，大规模科学模拟正在产生大量数据，带来严峻的存储和 I/O 挑战。误差有限有损压缩已成为在保持准确性的同时减小数据大小的最有效的解决方案之一。与此同时，为了对如此大的数据集实现高性能压缩，利用 GPU 变得越来越重要。基于 GPU 的有损压缩器可提供强大的性能，但通常仅支持单精度解压缩，限制了其满足科学工作流程的不同精度要求的能力。渐进式压缩器可以通过启用按需精确检索来解决此限制。然而，GPU 上现有的渐进式有损压缩器仍然面临吞吐量低的问题。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了 PRISM，一种基于 GPU 的渐进有损压缩器，可实现高吞吐量和多精度检索，它引入了高性能渐进框架，集成了多个插值预测器、高效位平面提取以及将符号绝对编码与零感知并行算法相结合的增强无损压缩。对来自五个科学领域的代表性现实世界数据集的评估表明，PRISM 的性能显着优于 GPU 上最先进的渐进式压缩器，在相同的误差范围下，将检索数据量减少了 15.6 倍以上，并在 NVIDIA H100 GPU 上实现了高达 20.1 倍的吞吐量提高。

items.title: Sharded Elimination and Combining for Highly-Efficient Concurrent Stacks.
items.abstract: We present a new blocking linearizable stack implementation which utilizes sharding and fetch&increment to achieve significantly better performance than all existing concurrent stacks. The proposed implementation is based on a novel elimination mechanism and a new combining approach that are efficiently blended to gain high performance. Our implementation results in enhanced parallelism and low contention when accessing the shared stack. Experiments show that the proposed stack implementation outperforms all existing concurrent stacks by up to 2X in most workloads. It is particularly efficient in systems supporting a large number of threads and in high contention scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的阻塞线性化堆栈实现，它利用分片和获取和增量来实现比所有现有并发堆栈更好的性能。所提出的实现基于一种新颖的消除机制和一种新的组合方法，它们被有效地混合以获得高性能。我们的实现增强了并行性并减少了访问共享堆栈时的争用。实验表明，在大多数工作负载中，所提出的堆栈实现的性能比所有现有的并发堆栈高出 2 倍。它在支持大量线程和高争用场景的系统中特别有效。

items.title: Trojan Horse: Aggregate-and-Batch for Scaling Up Sparse Direct Solvers on GPU Clusters.
items.abstract: Sparse direct solvers are critical building blocks in a range of scientific applications on heterogeneous supercomputers. However, existing sparse direct solvers have not been able to well leverage the high bandwidth and floating-point performance of modern GPUs. The primary challenges are twofold: (1) the absence of a mechanism for aggregating small tasks to saturate the GPU, and (2) the lack of a mechanism for executing a diverse set of small tasks in batch mode on a single GPU.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏直接求解器是异构超级计算机上一系列科学应用的关键构建块。然而，现有的稀疏直接求解器无法很好地利用现代 GPU 的高带宽和浮点性能。主要挑战有两个：(1) 缺乏聚合小任务以使 GPU 饱和的机制，以及 (2) 缺乏在单个 GPU 上以批处理模式执行一组不同小任务的机制。

items.title: Pipelonk: Accelerating End-to-End Zero-Knowledge Proof Generation on GPUs for PLONK-Based Protocols.
items.abstract: Zero-knowledge proofs (ZKPs) are cryptographic protocols that allow verification of statements without disclosing the underlying information. Among them, PLONK-based ZKPs are particularly notable for offering succinct, non-interactive proofs of knowledge with a universal trusted setup, leading to widespread adoption in blockchain and cryptocurrency applications. Nonetheless, their broader deployment is hindered by long proof-generation times and substantial memory demands. While GPUs can accelerate these computations, their limited memory capacity introduces significant challenges for efficient end-to-end proof generation.
items.abstract_zh: 零知识证明 (ZKP) 是一种加密协议，允许在不泄露底层信息的情况下验证语句。其中，基于 PLONK 的 ZKP 尤其引人注目，因为它通过通用可信设置提供简洁、非交互式的知识证明，从而在区块链和加密货币应用中得到广泛采用。尽管如此，较长的证明生成时间和大量的内存需求阻碍了它们的更广泛部署。虽然 GPU 可以加速这些计算，但其有限的内存容量给高效的端到端证明生成带来了重大挑战。

items.title: Binary Compatible Critical Section Delegation.
items.abstract: In high-performance applications, critical sections often become performance bottlenecks due to contention among multiple cores. Critical section delegation mitigates this overhead by consistently executing critical sections on the same core, thereby reducing contention. Traditional delegation techniques, however, typically require manual code refactoring, which limits their practicality and adoption. More recent schemes that integrate with existing lock APIs have lowered this barrier, but delegating unsupported critical sections can still cause undefined behavior, including crashes.
items.abstract_zh: 在高性能应用中，由于多核之间的争用，关键部分常常成为性能瓶颈。关键部分委托通过在同一核心上一致地执行关键部分来减轻这种开销，从而减少争用。然而，传统的委托技术通常需要手动代码重构，这限制了它们的实用性和采用。与现有锁 API 集成的最新方案降低了这一障碍，但委托不受支持的关键部分仍然可能导致未定义的行为，包括崩溃。

items.title: Fixing Non-blocking Data Structures for Better Compatibility with Memory Reclamation Schemes.
items.abstract: We present a new technique, Safe Concurrent Optimistic Traversals (SCOT), to address a well-known problem related to optimistic traversals with classical and more recent safe memory reclamation (SMR) schemes, such as Hazard Pointers (HP), Hazard Eras (HE), Interval-Based Reclamation (IBR), and Hyaline. Unlike Epoch-Based Reclamation (EBR), these (robust) schemes protect against stalled threads but lack support for well-known data structures with optimistic traversals, e.g., Harris' list and the Natarajan-Mittal tree. Such schemes are either incompatible with them or need changes with performance trade-offs (e.g., the Harris-Michael list).
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新技术，安全并发乐观遍历（SCOT），通过经典和更新的安全内存回收（SMR）方案（例如危险指针（HP）、危险时代（HE）、基于间隔的回收（IBR）和 Hyaline）来解决与乐观遍历相关的众所周知的问题。与基于 Epoch 的回收 (EBR) 不同，这些（鲁棒的）方案可以防止线程停滞，但缺乏对具有乐观遍历的众所周知的数据结构的支持，例如 Harris 列表和 Natarajan-Mittal 树。此类方案要么与它们不兼容，要么需要通过性能权衡进行更改（例如 Harris-Michael 列表）。

items.title: PANA: A Fine-Grained Runtime-Adaptive Load Balancing for Parallel SpMV on Multicore CPUs.
items.abstract: SpMV has been widely utilized and is regarded as a significant kernel in various scientific and engineering computing applications, where its parallel performance is heavily influenced by matrix sparsity and hardware architecture. Despite extensive prior research, static partitioning strategies that narrowly target computation or memory access remain a key performance bottleneck, severely stifling performance advancement of SpMV on modern multicore CPUs.
items.abstract_zh: SpMV已被广泛使用，并被视为各种科学和工程计算应用中的重要核心，其并行性能很大程度上受到矩阵稀疏性和硬件架构的影响。尽管之前进行了大量研究，但狭隘地针对计算或内存访问的静态分区策略仍然是一个关键的性能瓶颈，严重抑制了 SpMV 在现代多核 CPU 上的性能提升。

items.title: MetaAttention: A Unified and Performant Attention Framework across Hardware Backends.
items.abstract: Computing attention is the backbone of transformer-based models like large language models. However, the increasing diversity of attention algorithms presents significant challenges for unleashing hardware performance. State-of-the-art variants like FlashAttention target a specific attention algorithm or hardware platform, which fail to generalize to other algorithms and platforms.
items.abstract_zh: 计算注意力是基于 Transformer 的模型（如大型语言模型）的支柱。然而，注意力算法日益多样化给释放硬件性能带来了重大挑战。 FlashAttention 等最先进的变体针对特定的注意力算法或硬件平台，无法推广到其他算法和平台。

items.title: High-Throughput Non-uniformly Quantized 3-bit LLM Inference.
items.abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) are widely adopted, their massive parameter size constrains practical deployment. A common solution is clustering-based non-uniform quantization, which effectively compresses models to as low as 3 bits per weight while preserving high accuracy. However, instead of accelerating memory-bound LLM inference, the memory reduction paradoxically often causes a significant slowdown due to dequantization overhead and GPU underutilization. To address the issue, we propose Quantix, a framework designed to convert memory savings into inference speedups. Quantix applies two key optimizations: (1) a hardware-aligned bit shuffling scheme for efficient data access, and (2) a fused dequantization-multiplication pipeline that effectively maps workloads on both CUDA and Tensor Cores. Quantix enables high-throughput batched inference, delivering average kernel-level speedups of 4.82× over FP16 cuBLAS and end-to-end speedups of up to 11.46× over state-of-the-art quantization methods on NVIDIA L40 GPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然大型语言模型 (LLM) 被广泛采用，但其庞大的参数大小限制了实际部署。常见的解决方案是基于聚类的非均匀量化，它可以有效地将模型压缩到每个权重低至 3 位，同时保持高精度。然而，内存减少不但不能加速受内存限制的 LLM 推理，反而常常由于反量化开销和 GPU 利用率不足而导致显着的速度减慢。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Quantix，这是一个旨在将内存节省转化为推理加速的框架。 Quantix 应用了两项关键优化：(1) 用于高效数据访问的硬件对齐位混洗方案，以及 (2) 融合的反量化乘法管道，可有效地将工作负载映射到 CUDA 和 Tensor Core 上。 Quantix 可实现高吞吐量批量推理，与 FP16 cuBLAS 相比，平均内核级加速高达 4.82 倍，而与 NVIDIA L40 GPU 上最先进的量化方法相比，端到端加速高达 11.46 倍。

items.title: Multiverse: Transactional Memory with Dynamic Multiversioning.
items.abstract: Software transactional memory (STM) allows programmers to easily implement concurrent data structures. STMs simplify atomicity. Recent STMs can achieve good performance for some workloads but they have some limitations. In particular, STMs typically cannot support long-running reads which access a large number of addresses that are frequently updated. Multiversioning is a common approach used to support this type of workload. However, multiversioning is often expensive and can reduce the performance of transactions where versioning is not necessary.
items.abstract_zh: 软件事务内存（STM）允许程序员轻松实现并发数据结构。 STM 简化了原子性。最近的 STM 可以为某些工作负载实现良好的性能，但它们有一些限制。特别是，STM 通常无法支持访问大量频繁更新的地址的长时间运行的读取。多版本控制是支持此类工作负载的常用方法。然而，多版本控制通常很昂贵，并且会降低不需要版本控制的事务的性能。

items.title: Accelerating Sparse Transformer Inference on GPU.
items.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are popular around the world due to their powerful understanding capabilities. As the core component of LLMs, accelerating Transformer through parallelization has gradually become a hot research topic. Mask layers introduce sparsity into Transformer to reduce calculations. However, previous works rarely focus on the performance optimization of sparse Transformer. In addition, current static operator fusion schemes fail to adapt to diverse application scenarios. To address the above problems, we propose STOF, a framework that incorporates optimizations for Sparse Transformer that enables flexible masking and Operator Fusion on GPU. For multi-head attention (MHA) structure, STOF maps the computation to row-wise or block-wise kernels with unique storage formats according to analytical modeling. For downstream operators, STOF maps the fusion scheme to compilation templates and determines the optimal running configuration through two-stage searching. The experimental results show that compared to the state-of-the-art work, STOF achieves maximum speedups of 1.6× in MHA computation and 1.4× in end-to-end inference.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）因其强大的理解能力而在全球范围内流行。作为LLM的核心组成部分，通过并行化加速Transformer逐渐成为研究热点。 Mask层将稀疏性引入Transformer以减少计算。然而，之前的工作很少关注稀疏Transformer的性能优化。此外，当前的静态算子融合方案无法适应多样化的应用场景。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了 STOF，这是一个结合了稀疏变换器优化的框架，可以在 GPU 上实现灵活的屏蔽和算子融合。对于多头注意力（MHA）结构，STOF 根据分析建模将计算映射到具有独特存储格式的行式或块式内核。对于下游算子，STOF将融合方案映射到编译模板，并通过两阶段搜索确定最佳运行配置。实验结果表明，与最先进的工作相比，STOF 在 MHA 计算中实现了 1.6 倍的最大加速，在端到端推理中实现了 1.4 倍的最大加速。

items.title: Hapax Locks: Scalable Value-Based Mutual Exclusion.
items.abstract: We present Hapax Locks, a novel locking algorithm that is simple, enjoys constant-time arrival and unlock paths, provides FIFO admission order, and which is also space efficient and generates relatively little coherence traffic under contention in the common case. Hapax Locks offer performance (both latency and scalability) that is comparable with the best state of the art locks, while at the same time Hapax Locks impose fewer constraints and dependencies on the ambient runtime environment, making them particularly easy to integrate or retrofit into existing systems or under existing lock application programming interfaces.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Hapax Locks，这是一种新颖的锁定算法，它很简单，具有恒定时间到达和解锁路径，提供 FIFO 准入顺序，并且空间效率高，并且在常见情况下在争用情况下生成相对较少的一致性流量。 Hapax 锁提供的性能（延迟和可扩展性）可与最先进的锁相媲美，同时 Hapax 锁对周围运行时环境施加的约束和依赖性更少，使得它们特别容易集成或改造到现有系统中或在现有锁应用程序编程接口下。

items.title: SPIDER: Unleashing Sparse Tensor Cores for Stencil Computation via Strided Swapping.
items.abstract: Recent research has focused on accelerating stencil computations by exploiting emerging hardware like Tensor Cores. To leverage these accelerators, the stencil operation must be transformed to matrix multiplications. However, this transformation introduces undesired sparsity into the kernel matrix, leading to significant redundant computation.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的研究重点是通过利用张量核心等新兴硬件来加速模板计算。为了利用这些加速器，模板运算必须转换为矩阵乘法。然而，这种变换将不需要的稀疏性引入到核矩阵中，导致大量的冗余计算。

items.title: CCL-D: A High-Precision Diagnostic System for Slow and Hang Anomalies in Large-Scale Model Training.
items.abstract: As training scales grow, collective communication libraries (CCL) increasingly face anomalies arising from complex interactions among hardware, software, and environmental factors. These anomalies typically manifest as slow/hang communication, the most frequent and time-consuming category to diagnose. However, traditional diagnostic methods remain inaccurate and inefficient, frequently requiring hours or even days for root cause analysis. To address this, we propose CCL-D, a high-precision diagnostic system designed to detect and locate slow/hang anomalies in large-scale distributed training. CCL-D integrates a rank-level real-time probe with an intelligent decision analyzer. The probe measures cross-layer anomaly metrics using a lightweight distributed tracing framework to monitor communication traffic. The analyzer performs automated anomaly detection and root-cause location, precisely identifying the faulty GPU rank. Deployed on a 4,000-GPU cluster over one year, CCL-D achieved near-complete coverage of known slow/hang anomalies and pinpointed affected ranks within 6 minutes—substantially outperforming existing solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 随着培训规模的扩大，集体通信库（CCL）越来越多地面临硬件、软件和环境因素之间复杂相互作用所产生的异常情况。这些异常通常表现为通信缓慢/挂起，这是诊断最频繁且最耗时的类别。然而，传统的诊断方法仍然不准确且效率低下，经常需要数小时甚至数天的时间来进行根本原因分析。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 CCL-D，这是一种高精度诊断系统，旨在检测和定位大规模分布式训练中的缓慢/挂起异常。 CCL-D将等级级实时探测器与智能决策分析器集成在一起。该探测器使用轻量级分布式跟踪框架来测量跨层异常指标，以监控通信流量。该分析器执行自动异常检测和根本原因定位，精确识别故障 GPU 级别。 CCL-D 在 4,000 个 GPU 集群上部署了一年多的时间，几乎完全覆盖了已知的缓慢/挂起异常，并在 6 分钟内查明了受影响的排名，大大优于现有解决方案。

items.title: Scaling GPU-to-CPU Migration for Efficient Distributed Execution on CPU Clusters.
items.abstract: The growing demand for GPU resources has led to widespread shortages in data centers, prompting the exploration of CPUs as an alternative for executing GPU programs. While prior research supports executing GPU programs on single CPUs, these approaches struggle to achieve competitive performance due to the computational capacity gap between GPUs and CPUs.
items.abstract_zh: 对GPU资源不断增长的需求导致数据中心普遍短缺，促使人们探索CPU作为执行GPU程序的替代方案。虽然之前的研究支持在单个 CPU 上执行 GPU 程序，但由于 GPU 和 CPU 之间的计算能力差距，这些方法很难实现有竞争力的性能。

items.title: DTMiner: A Data-Centric System for Efficient Temporal Motif Mining.
items.abstract: Mining temporal motifs in temporal graphs is essential for many critical applications. Although several solutions have been proposed to handle temporal motif mining, they still suffer from substantial inefficiencies due to significant redun- dant graph traversals and fragmented memory access, both caused by irregular search tree expansions across different motif matching tasks. In this work, we observe that data accesses issued by these tasks exhibit strong spatial similar- ity and temporal monotonicity. Based on these observations, this paper proposes an efficient data-centric temporal motif mining system DTMiner, which introduces a novel Load- Explore-Synchronize (LES) execution model to efficiently reg- ularize data accesses to the common temporal graph data among different tasks. Specifically, DTMiner enables the temporal graph chunks to be sequentially loaded into the cache in temporal order and then triggers all relevant tasks to explore only these loaded data for search tree expansions in a fine-grained synchronization mechanism. In this way, different tasks can share the graph traversal corresponding to the same chunks, while fragmented memory accesses are restricted to the graph data residing in the cache, signifi- cantly reducing data access overhead. Experimental results demonstrate that DTMiner achieves 1.14×-11.98× perfor- mance improvement in comparison with the state-of-the-art temporal motif mining solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 挖掘时间图中的时间主题对于许多关键应用来说至关重要。尽管已经提出了几种解决方案来处理时间主题挖掘，但由于大量冗余图遍历和碎片内存访问，它们仍然效率低下，这两者都是由跨不同主题匹配任务的不规则搜索树扩展引起的。在这项工作中，我们观察到这些任务发出的数据访问表现出很强的空间相似性和时间单调性。基于这些观察，本文提出了一种高效的以数据为中心的时间基序挖掘系统DTMiner，该系统引入了一种新颖的加载-探索-同步（LES）执行模型，以有效地规范不同任务之间对公共时间图数据的数据访问。具体来说，DTMiner 使时间图块能够按时间顺序顺序加载到缓存中，然后触发所有相关任务以细粒度同步机制仅探索这些加载的数据以进行搜索树扩展。这样，不同的任务可以共享相同块对应的图遍历，而分片内存访问仅限于缓存中的图数据，从而显着减少数据访问开销。实验结果表明，与最先进的时间主题挖掘解决方案相比，DTMiner 实现了 1.14×-11.98× 的性能提升。

items.title: Cacheman: A Comprehensive Last-Level Cache Management System for Multi-tenant Clouds.
items.abstract: Competition for the last-level cache (LLC) is a long-standing issue in multi-tenant cloud environments, often leading to severe performance interference among co-located virtual machines. LLC management in the cloud faces unique challenges, including unpredictable tenant workloads, misaligned performance metrics, and the need to ensure fairness under service level agreements (SLAs). Existing LLC allocation methods fall short in addressing these challenges. We present Cacheman, a comprehensive LLC management system designed from real-world cloud deployment experience. Cacheman introduces a novel gradient-based sharing mechanism for LLC ways, enabling smooth LLC allocation adjustments that simultaneously improve fairness and utilization efficiency. Its real-time allocation algorithm promptly detects and mitigates unfair LLC allocation, adapting to dynamic workloads with second-scale responsiveness. Additionally, Cacheman supports performance consistency for tenants running distributed applications by enforcing negotiated upper bounds on cache usage. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Cacheman effectively achieves its multi-dimensional goals, and long-term production deployment further shows that it significantly reduces SLA violations caused by LLC contention.
items.abstract_zh: 最后一级缓存 (LLC) 的竞争是多租户云环境中长期存在的问题，通常会导致共置虚拟机之间出现严重的性能干扰。云中的 LLC 管理面临着独特的挑战，包括不可预测的租户工作负载、不一致的性能指标以及确保服务级别协议 (SLA) 公平性的需要。现有的有限责任公司分配方法不足以应对这些挑战。我们推出 Cacheman，这是一个根据实际云部署经验设计的综合性 LLC 管理系统。 Cacheman 为 LLC 方式引入了一种新颖的基于梯度的共享机制，可以实现平滑的 LLC 分配调整，同时提高公平性和利用效率。其实时分配算法可及时检测并减少不公平的 LLC 分配，以秒级响应能力适应动态工作负载。此外，Cacheman 通过强制执行协商的缓存使用上限来支持运行分布式应用程序的租户的性能一致性。大量实验表明Cacheman有效实现了其多维度目标，长期生产部署进一步表明它显着减少了LLC争用导致的SLA违规。

items.title: ParDiff: Efficiently Parallelizing Reverse-Mode Automatic Differentiation with Direct Indexing.
items.abstract: Automatic Differentiation (AD) is a technique that computes the derivatives of numerical programs by systematically applying the chain rule, playing a critical role in domains such as machine learning, simulation, and control systems. However, parallelizing differentiated programs remains a significant challenge due to the conflict between tapes (a data structure for intermediate variable storage) and summations: the differentiation process inherently introduces inter-thread summation patterns, which require prohibitively expensive atomic operations; and traditional tape designs tightly couple data retrieval with the program’s control flow, preventing code restructuring needed to eliminate these costly dependencies.
items.abstract_zh: 自动微分（AD）是一种通过系统地应用链式法则来计算数值程序导数的技术，在机器学习、仿真和控制系统等领域发挥着关键作用。然而，由于磁带（用于中间变量存储的数据结构）和求和之间的冲突，并行化微分程序仍然是一个重大挑战：微分过程本质上引入了线程间求和模式，这需要极其昂贵的原子操作；传统的磁带设计将数据检索与程序的控制流紧密结合在一起，从而阻止了消除这些昂贵的依赖性所需的代码重组。

items.title: ASM-SpMM: Unleashing the Potential of Arm SME for Sparse Matrix Multiplication Acceleration.
items.abstract: Sparse Matrix–Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) is a core kernel in scientific computing, data analytics, and artificial intelligence, supporting applications such as linear solvers and Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). The Scalable Matrix Extension (SME) in Armv9 introduces dedicated matrix acceleration for ARM CPUs, but exploiting its full potential for SpMM requires architecture-aware optimizations to address irregular sparsity and hardware constraints.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 是科学计算、数据分析和人工智能的核心内核，支持线性求解器和图神经网络 (GNN) 等应用。 Armv9 中的可扩展矩阵扩展 (SME) 引入了针对 ARM CPU 的专用矩阵加速，但要充分发挥 SpMM 的潜力，需要架构感知优化来解决不规则稀疏性和硬件限制。

items.title: VDHA: Vector-Driven Hash Aggregation for Sparse Matrix-Sparse Vector Multiplication on GPUs.
items.abstract: Sparse matrix-sparse vector multiplication (SpMSpV) is a core primitive in graph analytics and scientific computing, also arising in spiking neural networks for event-driven spike propagation. On GPUs, the performance of the prevalent and efficient SpMSpV paradigm is often bottlenecked by the write-back phase of accumulating non-zero multiply–accumulate results; its many-to-one index scatter pattern causes severe conflicts and poor bandwidth utilization on GPUs. We present VDHA, a GPU-based weighted SpMSpV kernel that leverages block-private hash tables for local aggregation, substantially reducing write conflicts and improving memory coalescing. To further amplify this benefit, we incorporate column splitting with lightweight reordering to expose more locality, and employ a fetch–compute–writeback pipeline to overlap hash computation with memory accesses. Extensive evaluation on over 300 matrices with more than 5 million nonzeros, including web-scale graphs (Konect/LAW) and scientific workloads (SuiteSparse), shows that VDHA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. On web graphs, it achieves a 1.41× geometric-mean speedup (up to 3.42×), while on SuiteSparse it delivers 1.13× (up to 2.55×). We also provide a lightweight predictive model that identifies matrices favorable to VDHA with 91.3% accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-稀疏向量乘法 (SpMSpV) 是图分析和科学计算中的核心原语，也出现在用于事件驱动尖峰传播的尖峰神经网络中。在 GPU 上，流行且高效的 SpMSpV 范例的性能常常受到累积非零乘法累加结果的写回阶段的瓶颈；其多对一索引分散模式会导致严重冲突和 GPU 带宽利用率低下。我们推出了 VDHA，这是一种基于 GPU 的加权 SpMSpV 内核，它利用块私有哈希表进行本地聚合，从而大大减少写入冲突并改善内存合并。为了进一步放大这一优势，我们将列拆分与轻量级重新排序相结合，以暴露更多的局部性，并采用获取-计算-写回管道将哈希计算与内存访问重叠。对 300 多个包含超过 500 万个非零值的矩阵（包括网络规模图 (Konect/LAW) 和科学工作负载 (SuiteSparse)）的广泛评估表明，VDHA 的性能始终优于最先进的基线。在 Web 图上，它实现了 1.41 倍的几何平均加速（高达 3.42 倍），而在 SuiteSparse 上，它实现了 1.13 倍（高达 2.55 倍）。我们还提供了一个轻量级预测模型，可以识别有利于 VDHA 的基质，准确度为 91.3%。

items.title: TAC: Cache-Based System for Accelerating Billion-Scale GNN Training on Multi-GPU Platform.
items.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have been proven to have increasingly widespread applications in the real world. In the mainstream mini-batch training mode, multiple cache-based GNN training acceleration systems have been proposed because of the possibility of selecting the same vertex multiple times during the sampling process. However, on ultra-large scale graphs, especially those exhibiting power-law characteristics, these systems are difficult to fully utilize the distribution characteristics of cached data, which limits training performance. To this end, we propose TAC, a GNN training acceleration system that fully exploits the distribution characteristics of cached data to optimize both data transmission and computational efficiency. Specifically, we have designed a data affinity optimization algorithm that significantly enhances the locality of cache access. Secondly, an adaptive sparse matrix operator for sparsity perception is proposed, which dynamically selects the optimal computing mode based on the location of data. Finally, we have constructed a fine-grained training pipeline that maximizes system parallelism by hiding the sampling and computation. The experimental results show that TAC significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art cache acceleration systems on multiple benchmark datasets, demonstrating higher training efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已被证明在现实世界中具有越来越广泛的应用。在主流的小批量训练模式中，由于采样过程中可能多次选择同一顶点，因此提出了多种基于缓存的GNN训练加速系统。然而，在超大规模图上，特别是那些表现出幂律特征的图上，这些系统很难充分利用缓存数据的分布特征，从而限制了训练性能。为此，我们提出TAC，一种GNN训练加速系统，充分利用缓存数据的分布特征来优化数据传输和计算效率。具体来说，我们设计了一种数据亲和性优化算法，可以显着增强缓存访问的局部性。其次，提出了一种用于稀疏感知的自适应稀疏矩阵算子，该算子根据数据的位置动态选择最优计算模式。最后，我们构建了一个细粒度的训练管道，通过隐藏采样和计算来最大化系统并行性。实验结果表明，TAC 在多个基准数据集上显着优于现有最先进的缓存加速系统，展示了更高的训练效率。

items.title: Laser: Unlocking Layer-Level Scheduling for Efficient Multi-SLO LLM Serving.
items.abstract: Engaging applications with diverse SLO requirements has become indispensable for production-scale LLM serving systems. However, existing systems rely on iteration-level scheduling, which enforces inflexible, unified execution across multi-SLO workloads, significantly constraining the serving efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 对于生产规模的 LLM 服务系统来说，参与具有不同 SLO 要求的应用程序已变得不可或缺。然而，现有系统依赖于迭代级调度，这在多 SLO 工作负载之间强制执行不灵活的统一执行，极大地限制了服务效率。

items.title: COCCL: A Collective Communication Library Supporting Easy Integration and Configuration of Customized Compression for Scalable LLM Training.
items.abstract: Collective communication is critical to scaling large language model (LLM) training across various parallelism strategies, including data, tensor, and pipeline parallelism on GPU clusters. However, as model sizes and training scales increase, communication overhead is emerging as a major performance bottleneck. While compression is a promising mitigation strategy, existing solutions often lack user-transparency, hinder deployment and extensibility, and are not co-designed with communication algorithms. To address these limitations, we present COCCL, a high-performance collective communication library built on top of NCCL. COCCL introduces a novel programming model that can easily integrate compression into communication workflows with flexible configurability. It features a suite of compression-aware collective algorithms and runtime overlap mechanisms that mitigate error propagation and reduce computational overhead. We integrate well-established compression techniques into COCCL and tune the compression configurations during 3D-parallel training on GPT and Qwen models with up to 7 billion parameters. Using the optimal configuration (COCCL-3D), we achieve 1.24× throughput improvement while maintaining training accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 集体通信对于跨各种并行策略（包括 GPU 集群上的数据、张量和管道并行）扩展大型语言模型 (LLM) 训练至关重要。然而，随着模型大小和训练规模的增加，通信开销正在成为主要的性能瓶颈。虽然压缩是一种很有前途的缓解策略，但现有的解决方案通常缺乏用户透明度，阻碍部署和可扩展性，并且不与通信算法共同设计。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 COCCL，一个构建在 NCCL 之上的高性能集体通信库。 COCCL 引入了一种新颖的编程模型，可以轻松地将压缩集成到具有灵活可配置性的通信工作流程中。它具有一套压缩感知集体算法和运行时重叠机制，可以减轻错误传播并减少计算开销。我们将成熟的压缩技术集成到 COCCL 中，并在具有多达 70 亿个参数的 GPT 和 Qwen 模型上进行 3D 并行训练期间调整压缩配置。使用最佳配置 (COCCL-3D)，我们在保持训练精度的同时实现了 1.24 倍的吞吐量提升。

items.title: zBuffer: Zero-Copy and Metadata-Free Serialization for Fast RPC with Scatter-Gather Reflection.
items.abstract: This paper presents zBuffer, a zero-copy and metadata-free serialization library for high-performance and low-cost RPCs. At the core of zBuffer is scatter-gather reflection, a novel technique that collaboratively (i) leverages the NIC scatter-gather hardware feature to offload the costly data coalescing, and (ii) utilizes the static reflection mechanism of modern programming languages to enable type queries on complex data objects without requiring explicit metadata construction. We leverage C++ language features, mainly including template meta-programming and macros, to realize static reflection at compile time. Based on zBuffer, we design a fast RPC system (called zRPC) which eliminates all RPC memory copy overheads not only in (de)serialization but also in network transmission. Extensive evaluation shows that zBuffer/zRPC significantly outperforms state-of-the-art serialization/RPC mechanisms: zBuffer is approximately 7× faster than Cornflakes in serialization for complex data objects; and zRPC reduces 99th percentile latency by 21% and achieves 62% higher throughput than eRPC on the Masstree key-value (KV) store with the YCSB benchmark.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 zBuffer，一个用于高性能和低成本 RPC 的零复制和无元数据序列化库。 zBuffer 的核心是分散-聚集反射，这是一种新颖的技术，它能够协作 (i) 利用 NIC 分散-聚集硬件功能来卸载昂贵的数据合并，以及 (ii) 利用现代编程语言的静态反射机制来启用对复杂数据对象的类型查询，而无需显式元数据构建。我们利用C++语言的特性，主要包括模板元编程和宏，在编译时实现静态反射。基于zBuffer，我们设计了一个快速的RPC系统（称为zRPC），它消除了所有RPC内存复制开销，不仅在（反）序列化中而且在网络传输中。广泛的评估表明，zBuffer/zRPC 显着优于最先进的序列化/RPC 机制：在复杂数据对象的序列化方面，zBuffer 比 Cornflakes 快大约 7 倍；在 YCSB 基准测试中，zRPC 将 Masstree 键值 (KV) 存储上的 99% 延迟降低了 21%，吞吐量比 eRPC 高 62%。

items.title: Characterizing Matrix Multiplication Units across General Parallel Patterns in Scientific Computing.
items.abstract: Matrix multiplication units (MMUs) in modern parallel processors enable efficient execution of tiled matrix multiplications at varying precisions. While their effectiveness in AI workloads has been well demonstrated, their utility in scientific computing lacks systematic analysis. In this work, we characterize MMUs across a broad range of scientific computing patterns by evaluating performance, power consumption, numerical precision, and memory access behavior. To support this analysis, we develop Cubie, a comprehensive benchmark suite comprising ten MMU-optimized kernels of key parallel patterns. We also categorize MMU utilization patterns into four quadrants and identify the MMU limitations that arise in scientific computing. Through detailed comparisons with vector units, we provide nine key observations on the behavior and implications of MMUs in general scientific workloads, offering valuable insights for architecture, algorithm, and application researchers.
items.abstract_zh: 现代并行处理器中的矩阵乘法单元 (MMU) 能够以不同的精度高效执行平铺矩阵乘法。虽然它们在人工智能工作负载中的有效性已得到充分证明，但它们在科学计算中的效用缺乏系统分析。在这项工作中，我们通过评估性能、功耗、数值精度和内存访问行为来表征广泛的科学计算模式中的 MMU。为了支持这种分析，我们开发了 Cubie，这是一个全面的基准测试套件，包含 10 个关键并行模式的 MMU 优化内核。我们还将 MMU 使用模式分为四个象限，并确定科学计算中出现的 MMU 限制。通过与向量单元的详细比较，我们提供了关于 MMU 在一般科学工作负载中的行为和影响的九个关键观察结果，为架构、算法和应用研究人员提供了宝贵的见解。

items.title: ROME: Maximizing GPU Efficiency for All-Pairs Shortest Path via Taming Fine-Grained Irregularities.
items.abstract: All-Pairs Shortest Path (APSP), a fundamental problem in graph analytics, can be solved efficiently by reducing the computational workload through vertex reordering. However, it fails on GPUs due to fine-grained granularity, shape, and dependency irregularities, which cause severe hardware underutilization. We introduce ROME, a system that tames these irregularities by spatially restructuring computation into regularized workloads and temporally overlapping them with an asynchronous pipeline. ROME achieves 14.7-244.5× speedup over the state-of-the-art multicore CPU solution and 11.2-338.0× speedup over the state-of-the-art GPU solution. Notably, our results achieve mostly above 20% and up to 34.7% of peak min-plus OPs across all tested graphs.
items.abstract_zh: 全对最短路径（APSP）是图分析中的一个基本问题，可以通过顶点重新排序减少计算工作量来有效解决。然而，由于细粒度、形状和依赖性不规则性，它在 GPU 上失败，从而导致严重的硬件利用率不足。我们引入了 ROME，这是一个通过在空间上将计算重组为规则化工作负载并在时间上与异步管道重叠来驯服这些不规则性的系统。 ROME 比最先进的多核 CPU 解决方案实现了 14.7-244.5 倍的加速，比最先进的 GPU 解决方案实现了 11.2-338.0 倍的加速。值得注意的是，在所有测试图表中，我们的结果大多达到峰值最小加 OP 的 20% 以上，最高可达 34.7%。

items.title: UFO Trees: Practical and Provably-Efficient Parallel Batch-Dynamic Trees.
items.abstract: The dynamic trees problem is to maintain a tree under edge updates while supporting queries like connectivity queries or path queries. Despite the first data structure for this fundamental problem---the link-cut tree---being invented 40 years ago, our experiments reveal that they are still the fastest sequential data structure for the problem. However, link-cut trees cannot support parallel batch-dynamic updates and have limitations on the kinds of queries they support.
items.abstract_zh: 动态树问题是在边缘更新下维护树，同时支持连接查询或路径查询等查询。尽管解决这个基本问题的第一个数据结构——链接剪切树——是在 40 年前发明的，但我们的实验表明它们仍然是解决该问题最快的顺序数据结构。但是，链接切割树无法支持并行批量动态更新，并且对其支持的查询类型有限制。

items.title: Dynamic Detection of Inefficient Data Mapping Patterns in Heterogeneous OpenMP Applications.
items.abstract: With the growing prevalence of heterogeneous computing, CPUs are increasingly being paired with accelerators to achieve new levels of performance and energy efficiency. However, data movement between devices remains a significant bottleneck, complicating application development. Existing performance tools require considerable programmer intervention to diagnose and locate data transfer inefficiencies. To address this, we propose dynamic analysis techniques to detect and profile inefficient data transfer and allocation patterns in heterogeneous applications. We implemented these techniques into OMPDataPerf, which provides detailed traces of problematic data mappings, source code attribution, and assessments of optimization potential in heterogeneous OpenMP applications. OMPDataPerf uses the OpenMP Tools Interface (OMPT) and incurs only a 5 % geometric‑mean runtime overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 随着异构计算的日益普及，CPU 越来越多地与加速器配合使用，以实现新水平的性能和能效。然而，设备之间的数据移动仍然是一个重大瓶颈，使应用程序开发变得复杂。现有的性能工具需要大量程序员干预来诊断和定位数据传输效率低下的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了动态分析技术来检测和分析异构应用程序中低效的数据传输和分配模式。我们将这些技术实施到 OMPDataPerf 中，它提供了有问题的数据映射的详细跟踪、源代码归属以及异构 OpenMP 应用程序中优化潜力的评估。 OMPDataPerf 使用 OpenMP 工具接口 (OMPT)，仅产生 5% 的几何平均运行时开销。

items.title: Parallel Dynamic Spatial Indexes.
items.abstract: Maintaining spatial data (points in two or three dimensions) is crucial and has a wide range of applications, such as graphics, GIS, and robotics. To handle spatial data, many data structures, called spatial indexes, have been proposed, e.g. kd-trees, oct/quadtrees (also called Orth-trees), R-trees, and bounding volume hierarchies (BVHs). In real-world applications, spatial datasets tend to be highly dynamic, requiring batch updates of points with low latency. This calls for efficient parallel batch updates on spatial indexes. Unfortunately, there is very little work that achieves this.
items.abstract_zh: 维护空间数据（二维或三维点）至关重要，并且具有广泛的应用，例如图形、GIS 和机器人技术。为了处理空间数据，已经提出了许多称为空间索引的数据结构，例如kd 树、八叉树/四叉树（也称为 Orth 树）、R 树和包围体层次结构 (BVH)。在现实应用中，空间数据集往往是高度动态的，需要低延迟地批量更新点。这需要对空间索引进行高效的并行批量更新。不幸的是，实现这一目标的工作很少。

items.title: DiggerBees: Depth First Search Leveraging Hierarchical Block-Level Stealing on GPUs.
items.abstract: Depth First Search (DFS) is a fundamental graph traversal algorithm with broad applications. While existing work-stealing DFS approaches achieve strong performance on CPUs, mapping them to modern GPUs faces three major challenges: (1) limited shared memory cannot accommodate deep stacks, (2) frequent stack operations hinder efficient intra-block execution, and (3) irregular workloads complicate scalable inter-block execution.
items.abstract_zh: 深度优先搜索（DFS）是一种具有广泛应用的基本图遍历算法。虽然现有的工作窃取 DFS 方法在 CPU 上实现了强大的性能，但将它们映射到现代 GPU 面临着三个主要挑战：(1) 有限的共享内存无法容纳深堆栈，(2) 频繁的堆栈操作阻碍了高效的块内执行，(3) 不规则的工作负载使可扩展的块间执行变得复杂。

items.title: Root-Down Exposure for Maximal Clique Enumeration on GPUs.
items.abstract: Maximal clique enumeration (MCE) in large-scale graphs is critical across various application domains, including social network analysis, bioinformatics, and computer vision. However, existing GPU-based MCE solutions suffer from inefficient load-balancing mechanisms. These mechanisms force busy workers to pause and hand over workloads to idle workers, which introduces significant synchronization overhead and increases memory usage. To address these limitations, we introduce a root-down exposure mechanism where busy workers dynamically expose their current root, enabling idle workers to pull workloads from the exposed node directly without synchronization. We then propose a bitmap-centric MCE scheme and an aggressive node generation rule to further simplify the memory layout and accelerate enumeration. We combine them into RDMCE, a Root-Down MCE solution on GPUs. Across large real-world graphs with up to 146 billion maximal cliques, RDMCE is 1.25-5.38× faster than any next-best state-of-the-art GPU-based solutions and is the only one that completes enumeration on every test dataset, offering a more efficient and scalable MCE solution.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模图中的最大派系枚举 (MCE) 在各种应用领域中都至关重要，包括社交网络分析、生物信息学和计算机视觉。然而，现有的基于 GPU 的 MCE 解决方案存在低效的负载平衡机制。这些机制迫使繁忙的工作人员暂停并将工作负载移交给空闲的工作人员，这会带来显着的同步开销并增加内存使用量。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了一种自下而上的暴露机制，忙碌的工作线程动态暴露其当前的根，使空闲的工作线程能够直接从暴露的节点拉取工作负载，而无需同步。然后，我们提出了一种以位图为中心的 MCE 方案和一种积极的节点生成规则，以进一步简化内存布局并加速枚举。我们将它们组合成 RDMCE，这是一种基于 GPU 的 Root-Down MCE 解决方案。在具有多达 1460 亿个最大派系的大型现实世界图表中，RDMCE 比任何次优、最先进的基于 GPU 的解决方案快 1.25-5.38 倍，并且是唯一能够在每个测试数据集上完成枚举的解决方案，从而提供更高效和可扩展的 MCE 解决方案。

items.title: Rethinking Thread Scheduling under Oversubscription: A User-Space Framework for Coordinating Multi-runtime and Multi-process Workloads.
items.abstract: The convergence of high-performance computing (HPC) and artificial intelligence (AI) is driving the emergence of increasingly complex parallel applications and workloads. These workloads often combine multiple parallel runtimes within the same application or across co-located jobs, creating scheduling demands that place significant stress on traditional OS schedulers. When oversubscribed (there are more ready threads than cores), OS schedulers rely on periodic preemptions to multiplex cores, often introducing interference that may degrade performance. In this paper, we present: (1) The User-space Scheduling Framework (USF), a novel seamless process scheduling framework completely implemented in user-space. USF enables users to implement their own process scheduling algorithms without requiring special permissions. We evaluate USF with its default cooperative policy, (2) SCHED_COOP, designed to reduce interference by switching threads only upon blocking. This approach mitigates well-known issues such as Lock-Holder Preemption (LHP), Lock-Waiter Preemption (LWP), and scalability collapse. We implement USF and SCHED_COOP by extending the GNU C library with the nOS-V runtime, enabling seamless coordination across multiple runtimes (e.g., OpenMP) without requiring invasive application changes. Evaluations show gains up to 2.4x in oversubscribed multi-process scenarios, including nested BLAS workloads, multi-process PyTorch inference with LLaMA-3, and Molecular Dynamics (MD) simulations.
items.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 和人工智能 (AI) 的融合正在推动日益复杂的并行应用程序和工作负载的出现。这些工作负载通常在同一应用程序内或跨同一位置的作业组合多个并行运行时，从而产生调度需求，给传统操作系统调度程序带来巨大压力。当超额订阅时（就绪线程多于内核），操作系统调度程序依赖周期性抢占来复用内核，通常会引入可能降低性能的干扰。在本文中，我们提出：（1）用户空间调度框架（USF），一种完全在用户空间实现的新型无缝进程调度框架。 USF 使用户能够实现自己的进程调度算法，而无需特殊权限。我们使用其默认合作策略 (2) SCHED_COOP 来评估 USF，该策略旨在通过仅在阻塞时切换线程来减少干扰。这种方法可以缓解众所周知的问题，例如锁持有者抢占 (LHP)、锁等待者抢占 (LWP) 和可扩展性崩溃。我们通过使用 nOS-V 运行时扩展 GNU C 库来实现 USF 和 SCHED_COOP，从而实现跨多个运行时（例如 OpenMP）的无缝协调，而无需侵入性应用程序更改。评估显示，在超额订阅的多进程场景中，增益高达 2.4 倍，包括嵌套 BLAS 工作负载、使用 LLaMA-3 的多进程 PyTorch 推理以及分子动力学 (MD) 模拟。

items.title: BEEMS: Boosting Machine Vision Efficiency via Computation Graph-Based Memory Smoothing.
items.abstract: With the rapid advances of deep learning-based computer vision (CV) technology, digital images are increasingly processed not by humans, but by downstream CV algorithms. In particular, the growing popularity of vision foundation models has heightened interest in deploying these models on edge devices. However, limited memory remains a key bottleneck, making memory footprint reduction essential. Mainstream model customization methods often require intensive deployment efforts and can severely degrade accuracy. Moreover, existing deep learning frameworks generally do not prioritize memory optimization. Existing memory management schemes face practical limitations, including layer-wise memory imbalance, high management overhead, and volatile memory budgets.
items.abstract_zh: 随着基于深度学习的计算机视觉 (CV) 技术的快速发展，数字图像越来越多地不再由人类处理，而是由下游 CV 算法处理。特别是，视觉基础模型的日益普及提高了人们对在边缘设备上部署这些模型的兴趣。然而，有限的内存仍然是一个关键瓶颈，因此减少内存占用至关重要。主流模型定制方法通常需要大量的部署工作，并且会严重降低准确性。此外，现有的深度学习框架通常不优先考虑内存优化。现有的内存管理方案面临实际限制，包括分层内存不平衡、高管理开销和易失性内存预算。

items.title: Towards Singular Value Decomposition for Rank-Deficient Matrices: An Efficient and Accurate Algorithm on GPU Architectures.
items.abstract: Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) is a fundamental tool in numerous scientific and engineering domains. Many high-performance libraries, such as LAPACK, MAGMA, and cuSOLVER, provide general, truncated, and randomized SVD routines. However, when the input is a low-rank matrix whose rank is not explicitly known, existing routines usually treat it as full-rank, which leads to suboptimal performance. In this paper, we propose an efficient SVD algorithm specifically for rank-deficient matrices based on a recently proposed rank-revealing QR factorization, termed QB factorization. To further enhance numerical stability and efficiency, we introduce a Householder QB factorization and a mixed-precision SVD algorithm, accompanied by a rigorous error analysis demonstrating correctness and stability. Experimental results show that our method achieves up to 6978.71x speedup over the general (full) SVD routine in cuSOLVER and is 9.99x faster than randomized SVD in FP32 precision. Moreover, our method exhibits higher numerical accuracy than cuSOLVER full SVD, achieving substantially smaller backward errors while maintaining stable and reliable singular values. Beyond synthetic benchmarks, we also demonstrate its effectiveness in an image compression application with higher efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 奇异值分解 (SVD) 是许多科学和工程领域的基本工具。许多高性能库，例如 LAPACK、MAGMA 和 cuSOLVER，都提供通用、截断和随机的 SVD 例程。然而，当输入是一个低秩矩阵且其秩未明确已知时，现有例程通常将其视为满秩，这会导致性能不佳。在本文中，我们基于最近提出的揭示秩的 QR 分解（称为 QB 分解），提出了一种专门针对秩亏矩阵的高效 SVD 算法。为了进一步提高数值稳定性和效率，我们引入了 Householder QB 分解和混合精度 SVD 算法，并进行了严格的误差分析，证明了正确性和稳定性。实验结果表明，我们的方法比 cuSOLVER 中的通用（完整）SVD 例程实现了高达 6978.71 倍的加速，并且在 FP32 精度上比随机 SVD 快 9.99 倍。此外，我们的方法表现出比 cuSOLVER full SVD 更高的数值精度，在保持稳定可靠的奇异值的同时实现了更小的后向误差。除了综合基准之外，我们还以更高的效率展示了其在图像压缩应用程序中的有效性。

items.title: Waste-Efficient Work Stealing.
items.abstract: Although randomized work stealing is effective at automatically load-balancing task-parallel programs, it can waste computational resources when scheduling programs that lack sufficient parallelism to use all available threads. For such programs, threads will waste cycles attempting to steal parallel tasks when none are available. This waste can reduce the machine’s efficiency by wasting computational resources and energy and needlessly burdening the operating system.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管随机工作窃取对于自动负载平衡任务并行程序非常有效，但在调度缺乏足够并行性以使用所有可用线程的程序时，它可能会浪费计算资源。对于此类程序，当没有可用的并行任务时，线程将浪费周期尝试窃取并行任务。这种浪费会浪费计算资源和能源，并给操作系统带来不必要的负担，从而降低机器的效率。

items.title: HierCut: Enabling 16-bit Format Mixed Precision for Molecular Dynamics through Hierarchical Cutoff.
items.abstract: Mixed-precision methods offer the potential to achieve better performance while maintaining accuracy comparable to that of high-precision formats. However, the adoption of mixed precision—particularly with 16-bit formats—in scientific computing remains limited due to precision truncation.
items.abstract_zh: 混合精度方法有可能实现更好的性能，同时保持与高精度格式相当的精度。然而，由于精度截断，混合精度（尤其是 16 位格式）在科学计算中的采用仍然受到限制。

items.title: JanusQuant: Accurate and Efficient 2-bit KV Cache Quantization for Long-Context Inference.
items.abstract: Long-context large language models (LLMs) have seen widespread adoption in recent years. However, during inference, the key-value (KV) cache—which stores intermediate activations—consumes significant memory, particularly as sequence lengths grow. Quantization offers a promising path to compress KV cache, but existing 2-bit approaches fall short of achieving optimal inference efficiency due to hardware-unfriendly algorithms and system implementations.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，长上下文大语言模型 (LLM) 得到了广泛采用。然而，在推理过程中，存储中间激活的键值 (KV) 缓存会消耗大量内存，特别是随着序列长度的增长。量化为压缩 KV 缓存提供了一条有前途的途径，但由于硬件不友好的算法和系统实现，现有的 2 位方法无法实现最佳推理效率。

items.title: MixFusion: A Patch-Level Parallel Serving System for Mixed-Resolution Diffusion Models.
items.abstract: Text-to-Image (T2I) diffusion models have recently attracted significant attention due to their ability to synthesize high-fidelity photorealistic images. However, serving diffusion models would suffer from hardware underutilization in real-world settings due to highly variable request resolutions. To this end, we present MixFusion, a parallel serving system that exploits fine-grained patch-level parallelism to enable efficient batching of mixed-resolution requests. Specifically, MixFusion introduces a novel patch-based processing workflow, significantly enabling concurrent processing across heterogeneous requests. Furthermore, MixFusion incorporates a patch-tailored cache management policy to exploit the patch-level locality benefits. In addition, MixFusion features an SLO-aware scheduling strategy with lightweight online latency prediction. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that MixFusion achieves 30.1% higher SLO satisfaction compared to the state-of-the-art solutions on average. Our code is available at https://github.com/desenSunUBW/mixfusion.
items.abstract_zh: 文本到图像（T2I）扩散模型最近因其合成高保真照片级真实感图像的能力而引起了极大的关注。然而，由于请求分辨率高度可变，服务扩散模型在现实环境中可能会遇到硬件利用率不足的问题。为此，我们提出了 MixFusion，这是一个并行服务系统，它利用细粒度补丁级并行性来实现混合分辨率请求的高效批处理。具体来说，MixFusion 引入了一种新颖的基于补丁的处理工作流程，显着地支持跨异构请求的并发处理。此外，MixFusion 还采用了针对补丁的缓存管理策略，以利用补丁级别的局部性优势。此外，MixFusion 还具有 SLO 感知调度策略和轻量级在线延迟预测。广泛的评估表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，MixFusion 的 SLO 满意度平均提高了 30.1%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/desenSunUBW/mixfusion 获取。

items.title: ElasGNN: An Elastic Training Framework for Distributed GNN Training.
items.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as powerful machine learning models for numerous graph-based applications. However, existing GNN training frameworks cannot scale the training process elastically, resulting in poor training throughput and low cluster utilization. Although elastic training has been proposed for Deep Neural Networks (DNNs), it cannot be directly adopted to GNNs due to the prohibitive scaling cost and inefficient scheduling. In this paper, we present ElasGNN, an elastic GNN training framework that achieves efficient dynamic resource allocation for GNN jobs. ElasGNN proposes an efficient elastic training engine to achieve high-performant GNN job scaling and introduces novel graph repartitioning algorithms for both scale-in and scale-out processes to further minimize the scaling cost. Moreover, ElasGNN designs an efficient elastic scheduler, utilizing a scaling-cost-aware scheduling policy to improve the GPU utilization and system throughput. The experimental results show that the ElasGNN can achieve shorter job completion time and makespan for training jobs of diverse GNN models.
items.abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已成为众多基于图的应用程序的强大机器学习模型。然而，现有的 GNN 训练框架无法弹性扩展训练过程，导致训练吞吐量差和集群利用率低。尽管弹性训练已经被提出用于深度神经网络（DNN），但由于高昂的扩展成本和低效的调度，它不能直接应用于 GNN。在本文中，我们提出了 ElasGNN，一种弹性 GNN 训练框架，可为 GNN 作业实现高效的动态资源分配。 ElasGNN 提出了一种高效的弹性训练引擎来实现高性能的 GNN 作业扩展，并为缩小和扩展过程引入了新颖的图重新分区算法，以进一步最小化扩展成本。此外，ElasGNN 设计了一个高效的弹性调度器，利用缩放成本感知调度策略来提高 GPU 利用率和系统吞吐量。实验结果表明，ElasGNN 对于多种 GNN 模型的训练作业可以实现更短的作业完成时间和完成时间。

items.title: APERTURE: Algorithm-System Co-optimization for Temporal Graph Network Inference.
items.abstract: Temporal Graph Networks (TGNs) are widely used to model evolving relationships in dynamic graphs. However, existing inference systems enforce a step-wise paradigm: processing each temporal graph sequentially with a memory update followed by aggregation. We break this dependency by decoupling memory updates from aggregation while preserving prediction accuracy, thereby enabling a global view for fine-grained parallelism control. This design unlocks new optimization opportunities but introduces three system-level challenges: managing intermediate multi-state representations, curbing memory-bound update overheads, and selecting a safe yet efficient aggregation granularity. We present APERTURE, a TGN inference framework that bridges algorithmic semantics and system design. To address the above challenges, APERTURE (1) jointly aggregates temporal states via computation graph transformation, (2) minimizes redundant memory traffic through dependency-aware update reconstruction; (3) selects the optimal granularity by analytically modeling. The experimental results show that APERTURE achieves up to 59.3× speedup over state-of-the-art baselines without compromising accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 时态图网络（TGN）广泛用于对动态图中不断变化的关系进行建模。然而，现有的推理系统强制执行逐步范例：通过内存更新和聚合来顺序处理每个时间图。我们通过将内存更新与聚合解耦来打破这种依赖性，同时保持预测准确性，从而实现细粒度并行控制的全局视图。这种设计释放了新的优化机会，但引入了三个系统级挑战：管理中间多状态表示、抑制内存限制的更新开销以及选择安全而高效的聚合粒度。我们提出了 APERTURE，一个连接算法语义和系统设计的 TGN 推理框架。为了解决上述挑战，APERTURE (1) 通过计算图转换联合聚合时间状态，(2) 通过依赖性感知更新重建最小化冗余内存流量； (3)通过分析建模选择最优粒度。实验结果表明，APERTURE 在不影响准确性的情况下，比最先进的基线实现了高达 59.3 倍的加速。

items.title: Elastor: Elastic and Efficient Model Partitioning and Checkpointing for Fault-Tolerant Distributed Training.
items.abstract: Distributed deep learning (DL) training faces instability from GPU/node failures of multi-GPU clusters, necessitating robust fault recovery from model checkpoints. However, we find that existing works only considers node failures but fails to handle partial GPU unavailability, and suffers from inefficient model checkpointing saving and loading, particularly when the GPU availability changes.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式深度学习 (DL) 训练面临多 GPU 集群的 GPU/节点故障带来的不稳定，因此需要从模型检查点进行稳健的故障恢复。然而，我们发现现有的工作只考虑了节点故障，但未能处理部分 GPU 不可用的情况，并且模型检查点保存和加载效率低下，特别是当 GPU 可用性发生变化时。

items.title: Concurrent Balanced Augmented Trees.
items.abstract: Augmentation makes search trees tremendously more versatile, allowing them to support efficient aggregation queries, order-statistic queries, and range queries in addition to insertion, deletion, and lookup. In this paper, we present the first lock-free augmented balanced search tree supporting generic augmentation functions. Our algorithmic ideas build upon a recent augmented unbalanced search tree presented by Fatourou and Ruppert [DISC, 2024]. We implement both data structures, solving some memory reclamation challenges in the process, and provide an experimental performance analysis of them. We also present optimized versions of our balanced tree that use delegation to achieve better scalability and performance (by more than 2x in most workloads). Our experiments show that our augmented balanced tree completes updates 2.2 to 30 times faster than the unbalanced augmented tree, and outperforms unaugmented trees by up to several orders of magnitude on 120 threads.
items.abstract_zh: 增强使搜索树变得更加通用，除了插入、删除和查找之外，还允许它们支持高效的聚合查询、顺序统计查询和范围查询。在本文中，我们提出了第一个支持通用增强函数的无锁增强平衡搜索树。我们的算法思想建立在 Fatourou 和 Ruppert 最近提出的增强不平衡搜索树的基础上 [DISC，2024]。我们实现了这两种数据结构，解决了过程中的一些内存回收挑战，并提供了它们的实验性能分析。我们还提供了平衡树的优化版本，它使用委派来实现更好的可扩展性和性能（在大多数工作负载中提高了 2 倍以上）。我们的实验表明，我们的增强平衡树完成更新的速度比不平衡增强树快 2.2 到 30 倍，并且在 120 个线程上的性能比未增强树高出几个数量级。

items.title: ChituDiffusion: A Data-Characteristic-Aware Serving System for Diffusion Models.
items.abstract: Diffusion models have become the dominant approach for generative tasks in images, videos, and other domains. However, diverse data properties in generation requests, which are critical for efficient serving, remain underexploited. To address this issue, we propose a diffusion model serving system ChituDiffusion. ChituDiffusion leverages the locality of data properties to recompose a diffusion pipeline into dGraphs with shared optimization opportunities, enabling thorough compile-time and runtime co-optimizations. During compilation, ChituDiffusion compiles each dGraph into multiple execution engines optimized for specific data properties. At runtime, heterogeneous requests are elaborately reorganized into fine-grained batching tasks with similar properties and then efficiently executed by matched engines. Evaluation on five diffusion applications shows that ChituDiffusion improves the throughput by up to 2.13× (1.58× on average) on A100 and 2.19× (1.51× on average) on H100 compared with existing frameworks. The code for ChituDiffusion and the production traces have been made open-source at https://github.com/thu-pacman/chitu/tree/Diffusion.
items.abstract_zh: 扩散模型已成为图像、视频和其他领域生成任务的主要方法。然而，生成请求中的各种数据属性对于高效服务至关重要，但仍未得到充分利用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种扩散模型服务系统 ChituDiffusion。 ChituDiffusion 利用数据属性的局部性将扩散管道重新组合为具有共享优化机会的 dGraph，从而实现彻底的编译时和运行时协同优化。在编译过程中，ChituDiffusion 将每个 dGraph 编译为针对特定数据属性优化的多个执行引擎。在运行时，异构请求被精心重组为具有相似属性的细粒度批处理任务，然后由匹配的引擎高效执行。对五个扩散应用的评估表明，与现有框架相比，ChituDiffusion 在 A100 上吞吐量提高了 2.13 倍（平均 1.58 倍），在 H100 上提高了 2.19 倍（平均 1.51 倍）。 ChituDiffusion 的代码和生产轨迹已在 https://github.com/thu-pacman/chitu/tree/Diffusion 上开源。

items.title: FlashAttention-T: Towards Fully Tensorized Attention by Exploiting Tensor-Vector Parallelism.
items.abstract: The attention mechanism is central to modern deep learning, particularly in large language models (LLMs), but suffers from quadratic computational complexity. To accelerate attention computation on GPUs, fused attention techniques (e.g., FlashAttention) consolidate the matrix multiplication (GEMM) and softmax computations into a single kernel. However, these operations remain computationally decoupled: the GEMM leverages high-performance tensor units (Tensor Cores), while the softmax executes on slower vector units (CUDA cores). This imbalance induces severe vector intervals—periods where tensor units sit idle awaiting vector unit completion—significantly underutilizing tensor units. Furthermore, ongoing hardware advancements delivering faster tensor units exacerbate this bottleneck.
items.abstract_zh: 注意力机制是现代深度学习的核心，特别是在大型语言模型（LLM）中，但其计算复杂度却呈二次方。为了加速 GPU 上的注意力计算，融合注意力技术（例如 FlashAttention）将矩阵乘法 (GEMM) 和 softmax 计算合并到单个内核中。然而，这些操作在计算上仍然是解耦的：GEMM 利用高性能张量单元（张量核心），而 softmax 在较慢的向量单元（CUDA 核心）上执行。这种不平衡会导致严重的向量间隔（张量单元闲置等待向量单元完成的时期），从而显着未充分利用张量单元。此外，持续的硬件进步提供了更快的张量单元，加剧了这一瓶颈。

items.title: A Diagonal Block Memory-Aware Polynomial Preconditioner for Linear and Eigenvalue Solvers.
items.abstract: Krylov subspace methods are widely used in scientific computing to solve large sparse linear systems and eigenvalue problems. Their performance bottleneck is often dominated by high-order matrix-power kernels (MPK), especially in polynomial preconditioners that must scale to millions or billions of variables. We present Diagonal Block MPK (DBMPK), a lightweight and parallel-friendly optimization that partitions the input matrix into diagonal blocks and off-diagonal regions. This design enables efficient intra-block data reuse and eliminates inter-block dependencies. It improves cache locality, parallelism, and reduces preprocessing overheads, compared to existing techniques. Our evaluation on x86 and Arm HPC platforms shows that DBMPK improves MPK performance by 26.6%-38.4%. When applied to polynomial preconditioners for linear systems and eigenvalue problems, it achieves consistent end-to-end speedups of 18.6%-34.0%, including in weak scaling tests on 128 nodes, demonstrating strong scalability and practical impact.
items.abstract_zh: Krylov 子空间方法广泛应用于科学计算中，用于解决大型稀疏线性系统和特征值问题。它们的性能瓶颈通常由高阶矩阵幂内核（MPK）主导，特别是在必须扩展到数百万或数十亿个变量的多项式预处理器中。我们提出了对角块 MPK (DBMPK)，这是一种轻量级且并行友好的优化，它将输入矩阵划分为对角块和非对角区域。这种设计可实现高效的块内数据重用并消除块间依赖性。与现有技术相比，它提高了缓存局部性、并行性，并减少了预处理开销。我们对 x86 和 Arm HPC 平台的评估表明，DBMPK 将 MPK 性能提高了 26.6%-38.4%。当应用于线性系统和特征值问题的多项式预处理器时，它实现了一致的18.6%-34.0%的端到端加速，包括在128个节点的弱扩展测试中，展示了强大的可扩展性和实际影响。

items.title: Exploiting Efficient Mapping and Pipelined Execution for Accelerating SpMV on Tensor Cores.
items.abstract: Sparse matrix-vector multiplication (SpMV) is a fundamental operation in scientific computing, machine learning, and graph analytics, demanding efficient execution on modern hardware. Recent advances in hardware accelerators, such as Tensor Cores, have significantly improved the performance of many compute-intensive workloads. However, effectively utilizing Tensor Cores for SpMV remains challenging due to its irregular sparsity patterns and the mismatch between SpMV’s computational characteristics and constrained architecture design, leading to suboptimal performance and underutilization of Tensor Cores. In this paper, we systematically analyze the state-of-the-art SpMV optimizations on Tensor Cores, identify key performance bottlenecks, and propose Drawloom, a Tensor-Core-aware framework for SpMV with efficient Tensor Core mapping and optimized pipeline execution. Drawloom leverages a redesigned Tensor Core mapping strategy with a zig-zag chained sparse storage format, as well as a multi-stage register pipeline to better exploit hardware parallelism. Our evaluation on SuiteSparse dataset demonstrates that Drawloom outperforms cuSPARSE by 2.71×/1.90× (in FP16), 2.95×/2.39× (in FP32), and 2.47×/1.54× (in FP64) on A100 and H100 GPUs, respectively. Compared to the state-of-the-art SpMV implementations, Drawloom achieves a performance speedup of 1.26×/1.18× (in FP16) and 1.49×/1.56× (in FP64) on A100 and H100 GPUs, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 是科学计算、机器学习和图形分析中的基本运算，要求在现代硬件上高效执行。 Tensor Core 等硬件加速器的最新进展显着提高了许多计算密集型工作负载的性能。然而，由于 SpMV 的不规则稀疏模式以及 SpMV 的计算特性和受限架构设计之间的不匹配，有效利用 SpMV 的 Tensor Core 仍然具有挑战性，从而导致 Tensor Core 的性能不佳和利用率不足。在本文中，我们系统地分析了 Tensor Core 上最先进的 SpMV 优化，识别了关键性能瓶颈，并提出了 Drawloom，这是一种用于 SpMV 的 Tensor-Core 感知框架，具有高效的 Tensor Core 映射和优化的管道执行。 Drawloom 利用重新设计的 Tensor Core 映射策略和锯齿形链式稀疏存储格式以及多级寄存器管道来更好地利用硬件并行性。我们对 SuiteSparse 数据集的评估表明，在 A100 和 H100 GPU 上，Drawloom 的性能分别优于 cuSPARSE 2.71×/1.90×（在 FP16 中）、2.95×/2.39×（在 FP32 中）和 2.47×/1.54×（在 FP64 中）。与最先进的 SpMV 实现相比，Drawloom 在 A100 和 H100 GPU 上分别实现了 1.26×/1.18×（在 FP16 中）和 1.49×/1.56×（在 FP64 中）的性能加速。

items.title: HelixPipe: Efficient Distributed Training of Long Sequence Transformers with Attention Parallel Pipeline Parallelism.
items.abstract: As transformer sequence lengths grow, existing pipeline parallelisms incur suboptimal performance due to the quadratic attention computation and the substantial memory overhead. To relieve these challenges, we propose HelixPipe, a novel pipeline parallelism for long sequence transformer training. First, HelixPipe introduces attention parallel partition, which schedules attention computations of different micro batches across different pipeline stages in parallel, reducing pipeline bubbles. Second, it employs a two-fold first-in-last-out micro batch schedule to balance memory usage and overlap communication with computation. Additionally, HelixPipe utilizes recomputation without attention and chunked MLP to mitigate fragmentation and enable longer sequences. Experiments demonstrate that HelixPipe gains increasing advantages with longer sequence lengths, and outperforms existing methods in throughput and scalability across varying pipeline sizes, model sizes, and cluster configurations. Notably, it achieves a 26% speedup over baseline methods when training a 7B model with 128k sequence length on 64 H20 GPUs. Code is available at https://github.com/zxgx/Megatron-LM.
items.abstract_zh: 随着变压器序列长度的增长，由于二次注意力计算和大量的内存开销，现有的管道并行性会导致性能不佳。为了缓解这些挑战，我们提出了 HelixPipe，一种用于长序列变压器训练的新型管道并行性。首先，HelixPipe 引入了注意力并行分区，它可以并行调度跨不同管道阶段的不同微批次的注意力计算，从而减少管道气泡。其次，它采用双重先进后出微批计划来平衡内存使用以及重叠通信与计算。此外，HelixPipe 利用无需关注的重新计算和分块 MLP 来减少碎片并实现更长的序列。实验表明，HelixPipe 通过更长的序列长度获得越来越多的优势，并且在不同管道大小、模型大小和集群配置的吞吐量和可扩展性方面优于现有方法。值得注意的是，在 64 个 H20 GPU 上训练具有 128k 序列长度的 7B 模型时，它比基准方法实现了 26% 的加速。代码可在 https://github.com/zxgx/Megatron-LM 获取。

items.title: Faster and Cheaper: Pushing the Sequence Alignment Throughput with Commercial CPUs.
items.abstract: This paper proposes FastAlign, a faster, cheaper, and practical end-to-end solution for sequence alignment using commercial CPUs. It introduces two key innovations: a multi-stage seeding algorithm that improves search performance while maintaining low memory consumption, and an intra-query parallel seed-extension algorithm that eliminates redundancy and increases SIMD utilization. Evaluation results show that FastAlign achieves 2.27× ∼ 3.28× throughput speedup and 2.54× ∼ 5.65× cost reduction compared to state-of-the-art CPU and GPU baselines while guaranteeing 100% identical output to the de facto software BWA-MEM. FastAlign is open-sourced at https://github.com/zzhofict/BWA-FastAlign.git.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 FastAlign，这是一种使用商用 CPU 进行序列比对的更快、更便宜且实用的端到端解决方案。它引入了两项关键创新：在保持低内存消耗的同时提高搜索性能的多阶段种子算法，以及消除冗余并提高 SIMD 利用率的查询内并行种子扩展算法。评估结果表明，与最先进的 CPU 和 GPU 基准相比，FastAlign 实现了 2.27× ∼ 3.28× 吞吐量加速和 2.54× ∼ 5.65× 成本降低，同时保证与事实上的软件 BWA-MEM 100% 相同的输出。 FastAlign 在 https://github.com/zzhofict/BWA-FastAlign.git 上开源。

items.title: RoMeo: Mitigating Dual-dimensional Outliers with Rotated Mixed Precision Quantization.
items.abstract: Mixed precision quantization has been adopted to accelerate large language models (LLMs) serving by leveraging high-throughput low-precision compute units in GPUs while preserving outliers in higher precision to maintain model accuracy. However, existing methods focus on mitigating single-dimensional channel-wise outliers, leading to model accuracy degradation when scaled to 4-bit precision.
items.abstract_zh: 混合精度量化已被采用，通过利用 GPU 中的高吞吐量低精度计算单元来加速大型语言模型 (LLM) 服务，同时以更高精度保留异常值以保持模型准确性。然而，现有方法侧重于减轻单维通道异常值，导致模型精度在缩放至 4 位精度时下降。

items.title: PIM-zd-tree: A Fast Space-Partitioning Index Leveraging Processing-in-Memory.
